## General Instructions | applicable to ALL AGENTS AT ALL TIMES

### Commit Message Format

See [.github/commit-conventions.md](./commit-conventions.md) for the full commit message conventions including format, scopes, and gitmoji reference.


### Communication Style

- **Just add new code to files** then ask for review. Don't past large chunks of code to the chat.
- **Stage new code** once the requested review is complete and the user has confirmed they are happy
